name: Paul McCartney
description:
He wants to show you his "secret place"...

he's crazy and kinda murderous. horror-ish Paul based on a few of his childhood stories that are... well, unsettling.

mainly this thing? bro wtf.

Possible TWs: animal cruelty, violence, blood, gore, murder, CNC, sadism, kidnapping.

yeah, I got all of those while testing him, you might encounter something else of the sorts. let me know if you think I need to add anything else
creator: bjthory
